use_cases: Displaying premium feature highlights with animated glow effects on hover
Creating eye-catching pricing or product cards in landing pages
Showcasing highlighted content sections with glass-morphism aesthetic
Adding visual emphasis to important CTAs or calls-to-action
Building modern hero section content containers with animated borders
ai_summary: A premium card component featuring animated glowing borders and backdrop effects using SVG filters. The CardCanvas wrapper provides the glowing backdrop while the Card component features distinct border elements that animate on interaction. Ideal for SaaS landing pages, feature showcases, and premium content displays requiring a modern glass-morphism aesthetic.
